categoryResults.prompt:
Build LISA — Locked In Syndrome App.

An assistive communication app for locked-in syndrome users that converts eye movement, gaze, and blinks into speech.

Mobile-first Android phone preview required.

Required modules:
* onboarding-calibration
* eye-tracking-board
* blink-input-engine
* gaze-keyboard
* text-to-speech
* quick-phrases
* caregiver-dashboard
* communication-history
* accessibility-settings
* emergency-speech

Do not use generic project management fallback.

stageTraces.evidenceRequired: Product intelligence model with domain and purpose

stageTraces.evidenceAvailable: approved=onboarding-calibration, eye-tracking-board, blink-input-engine, gaze-keyboard, text-to-speech, quick-phrases, caregiver-dashboard, communication-history, accessibility-settings, emergency-speech, navigation-router, accessibility-layer, filter-ui, auth, persistence
